data.delta: Generating your red fox image now — this usually takes a short moment.

I hit a wall on my side: even with your go-ahead, I don't have an approval channel to actually start the run from here — the system is blocking it and asking that the run be triggered directly rather than by me.

Everything is built and ready — your red fox prompt, 12 steps, CFG 6.5, one image, SDXL. If there's a **Run** control on your end for this workflow, go ahead and trigger it and it'll generate right away. If you're expecting me to run it and it keeps refusing, this is likely a permissions setting on the account that needs to be enabled before I can launch runs on your behalf.

Sorry for the snag — the workflow itself is complete and correct, so the moment the run can be triggered you'll get your image.
